title: teline linifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Teline linifolia var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leafed heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful for treating conditions such as digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Teline linifolia var. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, alleviate menstrual symptoms, and support overall well-being.
